title: Senior Software Engineer - Flipkart Capital India - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Flipkart Capital India - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
We at Flipkart Capital India are looking for an experienced Senior Software Engineer based out of Rajkot. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Flipkart Capital India:
Flipkart Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Machine Learning

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Flipkart Capital India!
jsonLd.skills: SQL, AWS, Agile/Scrum, Git, REST APIs, Node.js, Go, Machine Learning
